title: [MLC] Better Gear
description: Your tools and weapons are now presented as 3D models with visual enchantment display.
body:
![better gear title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/289190b8eddff9db4de71726deefe39f2fa3f572_0.webp)

ㅤ ㅤ

--- **Better Gear** is a resource pack designed to make your interaction with items more intuitive and enjoyable. It adds: * ✨ **3D Models** for weapons and tools. * 🌟 **Visual display of enchantments** directly on the items. --- ## Troubleshooting / Customization: If you are playing with the [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) mod and dislike how much screen space items take up in your hands, please follow these steps: - Ensure you have the [**Respackopts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) mod installed. - Go to the Resource Packs... - Click on the settings button for the Hold My Items resource pack, as shown in the screenshot.
Screenshot ![RP settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d026edb7afc4807570715b9918b882c80011e1be.png)
- Adjust the **`Z Offset`** and **`X Offset`** values to your preference. Approximate values for a good result are: * `Z Offset` around **-0.2000** * `X Offset` around **0.1000** If you discover a visual bug in the resource pack, please join our Discord server and report the issue in the **#bugs** channel. --- ## Developer Support We would appreciate it if you support the continued development of the resource pack! [![DALink donate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3c17bd9eeb7a52a1b4a80982af39ae5f7a95e00.png)](https://dalink.to/modlicube) --- ## Examples of what awaits you:
Spoiler
Vannila ![stone axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0c36c2677007dd852d5bf551351cb42907ca9e8.png) ![iron pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b99010c098f6d99a9a14c76d6907963a4827a94.png) ![diamond sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d57bb1d6176e0095bca4d22758757765e82c174_0.webp)
With the mod: Hold My Items ![stone axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86d33e6cc66844363f84fef2edcd0f1749496ba3.png) ![iron pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e5c43455046d9a7c11d6e16a855ca43918e8ed2.png) ![diamond sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee3d24e3d49b9d7d0fa12be12b09e153c5ca9675_0.webp)
